pages.text: Mobs that spawn with enchanted equipment are $(#7A2FBF)guaranteed to drop it$() when killed by a player or wolf (as in vanilla).$(br2)This lets you move those enchantments onto books and apply them to your own gear. Also applies to all tridents.$(br2)$(italic)Makes more sense with Loot Rework.$()

pages.title: Enchanted Loot
pages.text: A mob wielding an enchanted weapon you can claim.
